title: WA Performance Bond Signed Manifest
description: HSM-signed manifest binding a Washington public-works performance bond to signer identity, notarization evidence, clause provenance, and ledger proof. Conforms to PRD Section 5.6 (FR-06).

manifest_id.description: Unique identifier for this manifest (UUID v4).

schema_version.description: Semantic version of the manifest schema used to produce this document.

bond_request_id.description: Reference to the originating bond request.

document_hash.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the final signed bond PDF.

clause_version_ids.description: Ordered list of clause_versions.id values included in the bond.

rule_version_ids.description: All statutory/agency/carrier rule versions evaluated during issuance.

ledger_entry_id.description: Identifier of the record on the permissioned ledger. Present after ledger write.

ledger_hash.description: SHA-256 of this manifest excluding platform_signature, ledger_entry_id, and ledger_hash fields. Must match the hash stored on the ledger.

jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction code. Fixed to 'WA' for V1.

bond_type.description: Bond type identifier. Fixed to 'public_works_performance' for V1.

amount.description: Decimal string, e.g. '500000.00'. String to avoid floating-point issues.

penal_sum.description: Penal sum of the bond. Must equal the contract amount per RCW 39.08.

contract_id.description: Agency contract number referenced by the bond.

naic_code.description: NAIC company code for the surety carrier.

name.description: Full legal name of the principal signer.

email.description: Email address used for signing invitation.

signature_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the principal signed.

signature_method.description: How the principal signature was captured.

e_sign_provider.description: E-sign provider name (e.g. 'docusign', 'adobe_sign'). Present when signature_method is e_sign.

PrincipalSigner.description: Identity and signature metadata for the bond principal.

verification_id.description: Provider-specific verification record ID. NOT PII.

status.description: Outcome of KYC check. manual_override requires reviewer rationale in bond_request.

KycPointer.description: Reference to KYC verification record. Contains no PII—only provider and verification ID.

notarization_type.description: Remote Online Notarization or traditional wet-ink.

notary_commission_id.description: Notary commission number issued by the state.

notary_state.description: Two-letter state code where the notary is commissioned.

fingerprint_sha256.description: SHA-256 fingerprint of the notary certificate.

notary_certificate.description: X.509 certificate metadata for the notary's digital certificate.

ron_session_id.description: RON provider session identifier. Required when notarization_type is ron.

ron_video_pointer.description: Pointer to the RON audio/video recording in S3. Required when notarization_type is ron.

scanned_pages_pointer.description: Pointer to scanned notarized pages. Required when notarization_type is wet_ink.

notarization_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of notarization completion. Must be <= issued_at.

NotarizationMeta.description: Notarization evidence. Conditional fields enforced by notarization_type.

algorithm.description: Signing algorithm used by the platform HSM.

key_id.description: HSM key identifier used for this signature.

signature.description: Base64-encoded signature over the manifest payload (manifest JSON minus platform_signature and ledger fields).

items.description: PEM-encoded X.509 certificate. First element is the signing cert; last is the root CA.

certificate_chain.description: Certificate chain from signing certificate to trusted root.

signed_at.description: When the HSM produced this signature.

PlatformSignature.description: Platform HSM signature over the manifest payload.

checksum_sha256.description: SHA-256 checksum of the referenced object.

content_type.description: MIME type of the referenced object (e.g. 'video/webm', 'application/pdf').

size_bytes.description: Size of the referenced object in bytes.

S3Pointer.description: Pointer to an S3 object with integrity checksum.
